name: FightVanguardFelicity
_source: s;Vanguard;You are that Shifter I was informed of.|Now that I'm looking at you{tgm}...{w}{tgm} Why do you feel so familiar?;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None

s;Felicity;Huh? I don't know what you could be talking about.|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes}But, now that you mention it,|I also feel a sense of familiarity.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}Please forgive me, friend.|You have your reasons to fight, and so do I.;StyleNid=boss_convo_right;MessageTail=None
